project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Purchase Token, Subscription Receipt, User ID
project_privacy_data_flows.description: User subscribes to Notesnook Pro via Google Play in-app billing. Purchase receipt sent to payments.streetwriters.co for verification.

flow_steps.code: await RNIap.initConnection(); subs = await RNIap.getSubscriptions({ skus: itemSkus });
flow_steps.details: Google Play Billing connection initialized. Available subscription products fetched.
Available subscription SKUs: notesnook.pro.5year and notesnook.believer.5year.
User selects plan and completes purchase via Google Play Billing dialog. Payment processed by Google.
On iOS, purchase receipt and user ID sent to payments.streetwriters.co for server-side verification.
Subscription status cached in MMKV for offline access.
Google Play Billing permission declared in manifest.
